title: Systematic review protocol to identify Microbiological Hazards in Novel Foods
author: Cebrián Auré, Guillermo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This document describes the Systematic Review Protocol to identify Microbiological Hazards in Novel Foods, which will be carried out within the framework of the procurement titled MICROHAZ – Microbiological Hazards in Novel Foods (reference NP/EFSA/NIF/2024/02).  
  Following the background section, the protocol presents the approach used to define the assessment questions and sub-questions, and describes the methodology to be used for the identification of microbiological hazards in novel foods.
steps_raw:
